---
title: "Dr Josh Tyler"
image: images/joshtyler.jpg

about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 25em
  links: # create buttons
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/jtyler13
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:josh.tyler@bristol.ac.uk
---

# Data Scientist & Research Software Engineer {style="color: #45B39D"}
### Jean Golding Instistute @ University of Bristol {style="color: #1a7361ff"}
